name: Oven Swiss Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large ovenproof skillet, cook the bacon until it is crisp. Remove and crumble the bacon, then set aside.
2. Discard all but 1/4 cup of the bacon drippings.
3. Trim the beef round steak and cut into serving-size pieces.
4. Brown the meat on both sides in the remaining drippings.
5. Top each piece of meat with mushrooms, diced tomatoes, and chopped onion.
6. Sprinkle with dried tarragon.
7. Cover the skillet and bake at 325°F for 1-1/4 to 1-3/4 hours, or until the meat is tender. Baste the meat twice during cooking.
8. Remove the cooked meat to a serving platter and keep warm.
9. In a small bowl, combine cornstarch with water to make a slurry. Add this mixture to the skillet.
10. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and stir in the whipping cream.
11. Cook and stir for 2 minutes, then simmer uncovered for an additional 3-4 minutes, or until the sauce thickens.
12. Serve the sauce over the cooked meat.
